narrative:
57 Ohio House district has 86,408 registered voters, with 56.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.6%, a clear Republican lean of 6.5 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -2.1% D−R vs -11.2% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
